title: Binge-Worthy Thrillers to Obsess Over
excerpt: Get ready for a thrilling ride!
content:
Some science fiction thrillers have the ability to surprise and captivate audiences with their unique storylines and fresh takes on the genre.

A new wave of films is redefining the science fiction thriller genre, offering a mix of action, suspense, and thought-provoking themes that appeal to a wide range of viewers.

Greenland 2: Migration (2026)

Starring: Gerard Butler, Morena Baccarin, Roman Griffin Davis

Hope is uncharted territory.

Greenland 2: Migration follows the Garrity family as they embark on a perilous journey across the wasteland of Europe in search of a new home after the comet Clarke decimated the Earth.

The film's balance of action and emotion creates a sense of urgency, propelling the story forward and keeping viewers invested in the characters' fate.

With stunning visuals and impressive special effects, Greenland 2: Migration is a must-watch for fans of the science fiction genre.

PickMyBinge Verdict: 6.4/10

War Machine (2026)

Starring: Alan Ritchson, Dennis Quaid, Stephan James

All grit. No quit.

War Machine throws viewers into the midst of an intense battle between a group of Army Rangers and a giant otherworldly killing machine, testing their combat skills and resolve.

The film's narrative is distinctive due to its focus on the camaraderie and banter between the soldiers, adding a layer of humor to the dark and intense storyline.

Fans of action-packed science fiction films will appreciate War Machine's unique blend of action and suspense.

PickMyBinge Verdict: 7.2/10

28 Years Later: The Bone Temple (2026)

Starring: Ralph Fiennes, Jack O'Connell, Alfie Williams

Fear is the new faith.

28 Years Later: The Bone Temple explores the consequences of a shocking new relationship and the encounter between Spike and Jimmy Crystal, delving into themes of fear and faith.

The film's technical aspect is notable for its use of eerie sound design and haunting visuals, creating a sense of tension and foreboding.

Horror fans will appreciate the film's ability to craft a sense of unease and uncertainty.

PickMyBinge Verdict: 7.1/10

Mercy (2026)

Starring: Chris Pratt, Rebecca Ferguson, Kali Reis

Prove your innocence to an AI judge or face execution.

Mercy takes place in a not-too-distant future, where a detective must prove his innocence to an advanced AI judge, racing against time to clear his name.

The film's narrative is distinctive due to its use of a real-time format, adding to the sense of urgency and tension as the detective tries to prove his innocence.

Fans of science fiction thrillers will appreciate Mercy's unique blend of suspense and intrigue.

PickMyBinge Verdict: 7.0/10

Clayface (2026)

Starring: Tom Rhys Harries, Naomi Ackie, David Dencik

Look fear in the face.

Clayface follows the terrifying descent into hell of a promising Hollywood actor who has become a monster driven by revenge, exploring the loss of identity and humanity.

The film's technical aspect is notable for its use of practical effects to create the monster, adding to the sense of realism and horror.

Fans of horror films will appreciate Clayface's dark and unsettling atmosphere.

PickMyBinge Verdict: N/A/10
